## 🌌 About Me

```yaml
name:     Sanyukt Ramola
alias:    Kranvagn_4
degree:   B.E. Computer Science Engineering
college:  Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Pune  (3rd Year)
```

I like **different shades of blue** and multichromatic combinations.  
When I'm not pushing commits, you'll find me **drawing & sketching**, going on **long cycling rides**, deep-diving into **geopolitics**, or geeking out over **military hardware & vehicles**.  
Occasionally summoned by friends for gaming sessions — *purely involuntary, I swear.*

---
